_provenance: Seeded with the empirically-measured pandas 2.x drift (see tests/test_parity.py:27-30 docstring). Re-measure with `uv run python tests/fixtures/parity/measure_ulp_drift.py` on a pandas-3.x venv before promoting Phase 6 to GA. The dual-pandas CI matrix (PLAN.md W1-T4) re-runs the measurement on every commit.
